title: Draft: 11L NorMuon + LeakyReLU^2 + Full GPTQ + Delayed PPM
author: AnirudhRahul

other_params.description: Polar Express Newton-Schulz coefficients plus variance reduction on Muon updates

data.description: Replace ReLU(x)^2 with LeakyReLU(x, 0.5)^2 in the MLP

parameters.description: Delayed outside-context-only PPM bank at final sliding-window eval

data.method: Kanzi fallback to zstd then zlib

novel_contributions: Stacked 11-layer method built on NorMuon base with Polar Express Newton-Schulz coefficients and variance reduction
Use of LeakyReLU(x, 0.5)^2 activation in MLP instead of ReLU(x)^2
Full GPTQ export path with Hessian-aware int6 post-training quantization
Delayed outside-context-only PPM bank for final evaluation using a C trie helper
Compression fallback chain preferring Kanzi, then zstd, then zlib
